settings.heading: Gentle structure for puppy chew time.
settings.subheading: Help redirect teething energy with a supervised, correctly sized chew routine made for calmer moments.
settings.problem_heading: Puppies chew because they need direction.
settings.problem_text: Teething, boredom, and curiosity can turn shoes, cords, and furniture into targets when puppies do not have a better outlet.
settings.solution_heading: A slow, supervised chew routine helps redirect energy.
settings.solution_text: Prime Pet Food yak chews can support structured calm-time when sized carefully and introduced gradually.
settings.review_1: Helped us build a calmer routine after playtime.
settings.review_2: We sized up and supervised. It became our puppy's focused chew time.
settings.review_3: Cleaner than the treats we were buying every week.
settings.product_heading: Choose the right size before puppy chew time.
settings.product_text: Start slowly, supervise closely, and choose a chew larger than your puppy can swallow.
settings.final_heading: Build a safer puppy chew routine.
settings.final_text: Give teething energy a calmer, cleaner outlet.
